suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refine backend-worker guidance so strict tests-first sequencing is not mandatory for live-chain integration scripts/indexer fixes that depend on external state, while still requiring explicit post-change verification.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round-2 reviewer for fix-integration-test-issues reported the transcript again performed implementation edits before tests and pointed to backend-worker step 3 ('Write tests FIRST') as mismatched with real integration workflow.
